headline: Kimco Q1 FFO Beats Estimates on Strong Leasing, Higher Rents
summary: KIM posts a Q1 2026 FFO beat as leasing demand, rent growth and higher occupancy across grocery-anchored centers drive stronger revenues.

raw.headline: Kimco Q1 FFO Beats Estimates on Strong Leasing, Higher Rents
raw.summary: KIM posts a Q1 2026 FFO beat as leasing demand, rent growth and higher occupancy across grocery-anchored centers drive stronger revenues.

headline: REG's Q1 FFO Misses Estimates, Revenues Top on Leasing Momentum
summary: Regency Centers' Q1 FFO falls short of estimates, but revenues beat on strong leasing momentum, solid rent spreads and occupancy.

raw.headline: REG's Q1 FFO Misses Estimates, Revenues Top on Leasing Momentum
raw.summary: Regency Centers' Q1 FFO falls short of estimates, but revenues beat on strong leasing momentum, solid rent spreads and occupancy.
